examples: Its body which has a large rootlike holdfast a hollow stipe and branching blades with hollow gas bladders resembles that of higher plants.
It is the effigy of a forest spirit, as its deeply contoured features encased in rootlike tendrils and sprouting stems readily suggest.
Mountainously built, with a broad face surrounded by a mossy underbeard and rootlike dreadlocks, Lanier has an imposing presence that nonetheless comes off as oddly fluttery.
The region can be visualized as a rootlike labyrinth of narrow inlets, estuaries, and bays reaching south to the state capital, Olympia, 200 miles inland from the Pacific Ocean.
